KANBAN.TITLE: Kanban
KANBAN.EMPTY_COLUMNS: No columns yet. Add a column to get started.
KANBAN.SELECT_PIPELINE: Select or create a pipeline to get started.

PIPELINE_FORM.TITLE: New Pipeline
PIPELINE_FORM.NAME: Name
PIPELINE_FORM.AUTO_ADD_HINT: Every new conversation will be automatically added to the entry column of this pipeline.

COLUMN_FORM.TITLE: New Column
COLUMN_FORM.NAME: Name
COLUMN_FORM.ENTRY_POINT_HINT: New conversations will land here when auto-add is enabled on the pipeline.
COLUMN_FORM.WEBHOOK_URL_HINT: A POST request will be sent to this URL whenever a card is moved into this column.
COLUMN_FORM.SLA_MINUTES_HINT: Timer turns yellow at 50% and red when exceeded. Leave empty to disable.
